title: University of Southampton Delhi: A Global Top 100 UK University
text: Study with us A global Top 100 UK university, discover how University of Southampton Delhi will shape and transform the world of education for its students.
summary: University of Southampton Delhi, a global Top 100 UK university, aims to transform education for its students, providing world-class academic opportunities.

title: Undergraduate and Postgraduate Programmes at University of Southampton Delhi
text: Discover our programmes Our programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to that delivered to other University of Southampton students. To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, undergraduates study for three years, and postgraduates study for one year. Then hear from leading academics as they discuss these cutting-edge programmes and how University of Southampton Delhi prepares students for future career success. summary: University of Southampton Delhi offers English-taught undergraduate (3-year) and postgraduate (1-year) degrees, equivalent to UK standards, across various fields including engineering, finance, business, computer science, and economics.

title: Computer Science and AI Education at Southampton Delhi
text: Watch "Computer science in the age of AI" An insightful conversation between Dr Vishal Talwar (COO at University of Southampton Delhi) and Professor Tim Norman (Head of the School of Electronics and Computer Science at University of Southampton). They explore the University’s distinctive approach to teaching, learning and research in computer science, and how AI (Artificial Intelligence) will shape future work and graduate careers. Viewers will hear about Southampton's innovative pedagogy that delivers world-class teaching methods, and how cutting-edge research translates into real-world impact. Professor Norman also highlights how major investment in technical facilities in Delhi, combined with cross-departmental collaboration with electronics and engineering academics, offers students hands-on experience with the specialist hardware and tools needed to design, develop, test, and refine their projects to industry standards. With the first intake in August 2025, this is a must-watch for anyone interested in University of Southampton Delhi’s BSc (Hons) Computer Science programme.
summary: Dr. Vishal Talwar and Professor Tim Norman discuss University of Southampton Delhi's distinctive computer science education, focusing on AI's impact, innovative teaching, research, and hands-on experience with advanced technical facilities.
entities: School of Electronics and Computer Science

title: Innovative Economics Education and Campus Facilities in Delhi
text: Watch "Economics at the cutting edge" Dr Vishal Talwar, Chief Operating Officer at University of Southampton Delhi, joins Daniel Cernin, Senior Teaching Fellow in Economics, to discuss Southampton’s innovative and globally connected approach to Economics education. This conversation explores how University of Southampton Delhi blends academic excellence with practical experience, giving students the opportunity to earn a world-class degree right here in India. The purpose-built Delhi campus promotes interactive learning through roundtable classrooms, seminar spaces, and a state-of-the-art Financial Laboratory (Fin Lab) featuring Bloomberg Terminals and advanced computing facilities. The university's distinctive Triple Helix model—uniting research, teaching, and enterprise—ensures a dynamic, career-focused learning experience that bridges theory and industry. Whether you are passionate about policy, finance, or economic innovation, this video offers valuable insights into the University of Southampton Delhi BSc (Hons) Economics programme, which equips students for success on the global stage.
summary: Dr. Vishal Talwar and Daniel Cernin highlight University of Southampton Delhi's Economics program, emphasizing academic excellence, practical experience, state-of-the-art Financial Laboratory, and the Triple Helix model for career-focused learning.

title: Preparing Accounting and Finance Graduates for Career Success
text: Watch "Career-ready Accounting and Finance" Explore the diverse career opportunities available at the Southampton Business School as Dr Vishal Talwar, Chief Operating Officer, University of Southampton Delhi and Dr Hesham Bassyouny, Lecturer in Accounting & Finance at Southampton Business School discuss how students are being prepared to thrive in various sectors. Learn how the curriculum integrates artificial intelligence (AI), business-related software, and modern techniques to equip students with practical skills. Discover how strong theoretical foundations, leadership training, and hands-on learning prepare graduates to excel in corporate environments and entrepreneurial ventures alike. The Business School also provides robust career support through initiatives suchs as the Talent Development Programme, offering students practical exposure and real-world business insights. For aspiring entrepreneurs, Dr Hesham shares key advice: take the time to observe your desired industry, understand market trends, and identify growth opportunities. This insightful conversation sheds light on how the University of Southampton is shaping the next generation of business leaders who might be interested in University of Southampton Delhi BSc (Hons) Accounting and Finance programme.
summary: Dr. Vishal Talwar and Dr. Hesham Bassyouny discuss how Southampton Business School prepares Accounting & Finance students with AI-integrated curriculum, practical skills, leadership training, and career support for diverse corporate and entrepreneurial careers.

title: Sustainable Accounting and Finance Education at Southampton Business School
text: Watch "Shaping global finance leaders" Hear Dr Hesham Bassyouny, Lecturer in Accounting & Finance at Southampton Business School, and Dr Vishal Talwar, Chief Operating Officer at University of Southampton Delhi, as they discuss how Southampton Business School is reshaping Accounting & Finance education through innovation and sustainability-focused learning. Discover how the integration of industry-based assessments, Bloomberg terminals, financial labs, and business-specific software is providing students with hands-on skills to excel in real-world financial environments. Sustainability is at the heart of our curriculum, aligning with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Our students have the unique opportunity to create sustainability reports for companies, supported by our Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) accreditation - equipping them with the expertise to lead in sustainable financial practices.Learn more about the University of Southampton Delhi BSc (Hons) Accounting and Finance programme.
summary: Dr. Hesham Bassyouny and Dr. Vishal Talwar detail Southampton Business School's innovative Accounting & Finance program, emphasizing sustainability, industry-based assessments, Bloomberg terminals, and GRI accreditation for real-world financial expertise.

title: University of Southampton Delhi Academic and Professional Team
text: Meet our team Our academic and professional team members combine local knowledge of Higher Education in India with a wider perspective built on years of international experience. Our team
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi team comprises academic and professional members with extensive local and international higher education experience.
